tickets.title: Improve checkout flow usability
tickets.description: Users report the checkout process is too long and confusing. Need to streamline steps and reduce friction.

tickets.title: Simplify checkout steps
tickets.description: Checkout has too many steps. Customers abandon. Consolidate payment and confirmation.

tickets.title: Reduce checkout abandonment
tickets.description: High drop-off at step 3 of checkout. Investigate and fix.

tickets.title: Clearer pricing display
tickets.description: Users don't understand what they're being charged for. Add breakdown and tooltips.

tickets.title: Pricing transparency in billing dashboard
tickets.description: Billing dashboard is opaque. Customers want to see exactly what each charge is for.

tickets.title: Login fails when updating billing info
tickets.description: Users report login session expires or fails when they try to update payment method. Affects billing flow.
acceptance_criteria: Clear error message if auth fails

tickets.title: GDPR compliance for invoice export
tickets.description: Enterprise customers need to export invoices. Must ensure GDPR compliance for PII in billing records and data residency.

tickets.title: WCAG accessibility for checkout form
tickets.description: Checkout form fails WCAG 2.1 AA. Labels not associated, focus order broken. Screen reader users cannot complete purchase.
acceptance_criteria: All form fields have proper labels

tickets.title: Guest checkout option
tickets.description: Some users want to pay without creating an account first.

tickets.title: Add payment method from dashboard
tickets.description: Users should be able to add backup payment method without going through full checkout.
